title: Cryptool joins W3X Network Incubation Program, Batch 05
content_html:
Cryptool has been accepted into the W3X Network Incubation Program, Batch 05.

W3X is a top-tier Web3 accelerator, and the programme has pushed the all-in-one investment proposition into sharper focus. The team has used the time to refine the product for both Web2 and Web3 investors, and to plug into a wider network of mentors, partners and capital.

Any Web3 team thinking about an accelerator should put W3X on the shortlist for the next batch.
author: Cryptool
